changeSet.author: openelis-notebook-linking

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND ts.name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab'

changeSet.comment: Link Traditional Medicine notebook to test section for user access
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Traditional & Modern Medicine Research Lab';

changeSet.author: openelis-notebook-linking

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Link Bioanalytical notebook to test section for user access
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Bioanalytical Laboratory';

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Link Bioequivalence notebook to test section for user access
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Bioequivalence Laboratory';

changeSet.author: openelis-notebook-linking

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' AND ts.name = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory'

changeSet.comment: Link Genomics & Bioinformatics notebook to test section for user access
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n, clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Genomics & Bioinformatics Laboratory';
